overall.description: First-person night hiking footage through a dense forest trail. The camera wearer uses a warm-toned flashlight or headlamp to illuminate the uneven dirt path ahead while walking steadily through dark woods with trees lining both sides.

events.description: passing concrete retaining wall and entering dense forest interior

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path, flashlight illuminating the ground ahead while navigating away from the concrete structure

entered.detail: gray concrete wall or structure visible at the edge of the forest entrance
uneven dirt trail with scattered rocks and patches of grass
dense forest trees forming a dark wall on the left side of the path
dense forest trees forming a dark wall on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The clip begins at the edge of a forest at night, with a concrete retaining wall visible on the left. The camera wearer walks forward along a narrow dirt trail, using a flashlight that casts a warm glow on the path. Dense trees line both sides of the trail, creating an enclosed feeling as the concrete structure is left behind.

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk steadily along the winding forest path, navigating the uneven terrain by flashlight

segments.scene_description: Deep in the forest interior, the camera continues along the narrow dirt trail with no structures in sight. The flashlight beam illuminates the uneven path ahead while the dense tree lines on both sides fade into darkness beyond the light's reach. The walking motion remains steady as the hiker progresses further into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the edge of a forest into its deep, secluded interior. It begins beside a concrete retaining wall on the left, moving forward along a narrow dirt trail illuminated by the warm glow of a flashlight. As the camera progresses, the concrete structure disappears and the environment becomes more enclosed by dense trees lining both sides of the path. The scene then shifts into the heart of the woods, where the flashlight beam is the sole source of light against an encroaching darkness. Finally, the camera maintains a steady walking motion along the uneven terrain as the surrounding forest fades into a void beyond the reach of the lamp.
